name: Lina
description: Fire makes a fine servant, but a harsh mistress. Lina, the Slayer.

abilities.name: Slow Burn
abilities.description: All Lina's spells now applies a portion of the impact damage as damage per second debuff. Impact Damage to Damage per Second: 0.64. Debuff Duration: 4. Crit Damage: 150%. Debuff Duration: 3.

abilities.name: Dragon Slave
abilities.description: In the scorched barren of Misrule, Lina learned to manipulate the fiery breath of the Desert Wyrm as a form of entertainment. Cast Range: 800. First Radius: 275. Travel Distance: 1075. End Radius: 200. Damage: 65/125/185/245. Cooldown: 11/10/9/8. Mana Cost: 100/110/120/130.

abilities.name: Light Strike Array
abilities.description: Summons a column of flames that damages and stuns enemies. Cast Range: 700. Effect Radius: 250. Damage: 80/120/160/200 (190/230/270/310). Stun Duration: 1.2/1.6/2/2.4. Cooldown: 13/11/9/7. Mana Cost: 100/110/120/130.

abilities.name: Fiery Soul
abilities.description: Grants a stack of bonus attack speed and bonus movement speed per enemy unit affected per ability cast. Move Speed Bonus per Stack: 1%/1.5%/2%/2.5% (2%/2.5%/3%/3.5%). Attack Speed Bonus per Stack: 8/16/24/32 (18/26/34/42). Stack Duration: 18. Magic Resist per Stack: (5%).

abilities.name: Flame Cloak
abilities.description: Lina ascends and grants herself unobstructed movement, spell damage amplification and bonus magic resistance. Magic Resist Bonus: 35%. Spell Amp Bonus: 35%. Duration: 7. Set Stack Count: 7. Mana Cost: 25.

abilities.name: Laguna Blade
abilities.description: Fires off a bolt of lightning at a single enemy unit, dealing massive damage. Cast Range: 750. Damage: 380/565/750. Buff Duration: (5). Cooldown: 70/60/50. Mana Cost: 150/300/450.
